parameters.jsCode:
// Parse AI qualification result and prepare for Excel + Email const prev = $('Build AI Qualification').first().json; const aiResp = $input.first().json; let qualification; try { const content = aiResp.choices[0].message.content; qualification = JSON.parse(content); } catch (e) { qualification = { qualificationScore: 5, qualificationNotes: 'AI parsing failed â€” manual review needed', suggestedMenuTier: 'Standard', estimatedRevenue: 'Unknown', urgency: 'medium', followUpRecommendation: 'Contact lead directly for more details' }; } const lead = prev.lead; const now = new Date().toISOString(); // Excel row values (must match LeadsTable column order exactly) const excelRow = [ prev.leadId, lead.firstName || '', lead.lastName || '', lead.email || '', lead.phone || '', lead.company || '', lead.isNonProfit || lead.nonprofit || '', lead.eventDate || '', lead.hasVenue || '', lead.venueName || '', lead.budget || '', lead.guestCount || '', lead.source || '', String(qualification.qualificationScore), qualification.qualificationNotes, qualification.suggestedMenuTier, qualification.estimatedRevenue, 'New', '', now ]; // Confirmation email HTML const emailHtml = `

Executive Catering CT

Corporate & Event Catering

Thank you, ${lead.firstName}!

We've received your catering inquiry and are excited to help make your event exceptional.

Event Date: ${lead.eventDate || 'To be determined'}

Guest Count: ${lead.guestCount || 'To be discussed'}

Venue: ${lead.venueName || (lead.hasVenue === 'Yes' ? 'Venue secured' : 'We can help with venue selection')}

What happens next:

  1. Our team will review your event details within 24 hours
  2. We'll reach out to discuss menu options tailored to your needs
  3. You'll receive a customized proposal with pricing

If you have any questions in the meantime, don't hesitate to reach out.

Warm regards,
The Executive Catering CT Team

Executive Catering CT | Connecticut's Premier Catering Service

`; return [{ json: { accessToken: prev.accessToken, driveId: prev.driveId, leadsTrackerFileId: prev.leadsTrackerFileId, mailUserUpn: prev.mailUserUpn, leadId: prev.leadId, lead, qualification, excelRow, emailHtml, emailSubject: `Thank you for your inquiry, ${lead.firstName}! â€” Executive Catering CT` } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ message: { subject: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.emailSubject, body: { contentType: 'HTML', content: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.emailHtml }, toRecipients: [{ emailAddress: { address: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.email } }], from: { emailAddress: { address: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.mailUserUpn, name: 'Executive Catering CT' } } }, saveToSentItems: true }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ leadId: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.leadId, firstName: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.firstName, lastName: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.lastName, email: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.email, phone: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.phone, company: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.company, eventDate: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.eventDate, guestCount: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.guestCount, budget: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.budget, hasVenue: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.hasVenue, venueName: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.venueName, isNonProfit: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.isNonProfit, suggestedMenuTier: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.qualification.suggestedMenuTier, qualificationNotes: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.qualification.qualificationNotes, estimatedRevenue: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.qualification.estimatedRevenue, urgency: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.qualification.urgency, source: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.source }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ message: { subject: '[Catering Lead] ' + ($('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.firstName || '') + ' ' + ($('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.lastName || '') + ' - ' + ($('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.company || 'No Company') + ' (Score: ' + $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.qualification.qualificationScore + '/10)', body: { contentType: 'HTML', content: '

New Executive Catering Lead

Name' + ($('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.firstName || '') + ' ' + ($('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.lastName || '') + '
Email' + $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.email + '
Phone' + ($('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.phone || 'N/A') + '
Company' + ($('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.company || 'N/A') + '
Event Date' + ($('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.eventDate || 'N/A') + '
Guest Count' + ($('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.guestCount || 'N/A') + '
Budget' + ($('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.budget || 'N/A') + '
Has Venue' + ($('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.hasVenue || 'N/A') + '
Venue' + ($('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.venueName || 'N/A') + '

AI Qualification

Score' + $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.qualification.qualificationScore + '/10
Suggested Tier' + $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.qualification.suggestedMenuTier + '
Est. Revenue' + $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.qualification.estimatedRevenue + '
Urgency' + $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.qualification.urgency + '
Notes' + $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.qualification.qualificationNotes + '
Follow-Up' + $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.qualification.followUpRecommendation + '

Lead ID: ' + $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.leadId + ' | Source: ' + ($('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.source || 'Website') + '

' }, toRecipients: [{ emailAddress: { address: 'fxvarga@gmail.com' } }, { emailAddress: { address: 'fernandovargas@busybee690.onmicrosoft.com' } }], from: { emailAddress: { address: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.mailUserUpn, name: 'Executive Catering Notifications' } } }, saveToSentItems: true }) }}
